project.name: Reify
project.summary: Reify is a TypeScript package monorepo for representing operations as first-class serializable data and executing them through pluggable adapters.
goals: Make operations inspectable, serializable, storable, transmittable, transformable, replayable, and executable across environments.
Keep core operation data independent from adapter-specific execution details.
Own package boundaries, public exports, adapter contracts, examples, and release proof for the Reify package family.
nonGoals: Own downstream applications' domain models, database schemas, auth policies, workflows, deployment, or commercial logic.
Hide adapter-specific behavior inside the core operation model.
Publish package changes without CI/admission proof, release workflow evidence, and npm registry readback.

owns.name: operation-as-data-core
owns.description: Serializable operation model, builder APIs, pipeline representation, execution contract, and core package exports.

owns.name: reify-adapters
owns.description: Adapter packages that interpret operation data for specific execution environments.

owns.name: reify-package-release
owns.description: CI/admission and npm release evidence for the Reify package family.

doesNotOwn: Downstream product applications' domain models, persistence schemas, auth policies, workflow semantics, deployment, or commercial logic.
Runtime side effects outside adapter contracts and explicit execution contexts.
forbiddenCouplings: Do not add product-specific workflow, persistence, tenancy, or billing behavior to Reify core.
Do not let adapter packages redefine the portable operation data contract.
Do not publish package changes without CI/admission proof and npm registry readback.

delivery.deployPath: Pull requests and merge groups run .github/workflows/ci.yml with ADR-29 admission contexts; main pushes run .github/workflows/release.yml to create or publish release changes through @sylphx/bump.
delivery.productionProof: ADR-29 admission pass, CI pass, release PR or publish workflow completion, and npm registry readback for changed packages.

packageRelease.releaseIntent: Reify publishes public @sylphx package artifacts through the repo-local release workflow.
packageRelease.versionPr: @sylphx/bump creates or updates release PRs on normal main commits and publishes on release commits.
packageRelease.publishProof: npm registry readback for each changed @sylphx/reify package.

gaps.description: ADR-29 postsubmit proof exists for main pushes; keep release publication gated by explicit release workflow evidence and registry readback.
